---
title: "huginn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\huginn.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 13
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.40
overall_score: 2.41
---

## Intent
The `huginn.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on HuginnWarden, __init__, scan, _scan_regex, _scan_neural_async. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via HuginnWarden, __init__, scan, _scan_regex, _scan_neural_async. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `HuginnWarden`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `_scan_regex`
- `_scan_neural_async`
